title: The Wise Guy
writer: Jules Furthman, Adela Rogers St. Johns, Ada McQuillan
actors: James Kirkwood, Mary Astor, Betty Compson
plot: Gut Watson, known as a wise guy, decides to turn his traveling vaudeville troupe and tent into an evangelistic movement, and make more money preaching than acting. One of the troupers is Mary, a girl left destitute by her father's...
